# Bricks of India
> India's first LEGO® price comparison and review site. Compare LEGO prices across Indian retailers, read honest reviews, get news with India context.

## Key pages
- [Homepage](https://www.bricksofindia.com/): Live LEGO price comparison across 3 Indian stores
- [All sets](https://www.bricksofindia.com/sets): Full LEGO set catalogue with Indian prices
- [Themes](https://www.bricksofindia.com/themes): LEGO sets by theme
- [Deals](https://www.bricksofindia.com/deals): Current LEGO deals in India
- [Reviews](https://www.bricksofindia.com/reviews): Independent LEGO set reviews with India price context
- [News](https://www.bricksofindia.com/news): LEGO news written from an India perspective
- [About](https://www.bricksofindia.com/about): About Abhinav Bhargav and the Bricks of India project

## About the author
All content is written by Abhinav Bhargav, founder of Bricks of India. 20+ years in enterprise sales, marketing, and account management. Cornell University. Running Bricks of India on YouTube, Instagram, and web since 2024.

## Content policy
All prices are scraped from official Indian retailer APIs, updated daily. Reviews are independent and not sponsored. News posts are written from scratch with India context — not summaries of other sites.

## Contact
abhinav@bricksofindia.com

## What this site is not
Not affiliated with or endorsed by the LEGO Group. LEGO® is a trademark of the LEGO Group.
